title: thelypteris subfalciloba
intro: Thelypteris subfalciloba, also known as the Mountain Fern or Japanese Shield Fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Thelypteridaceae. The plant is native to East Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The medicinal properties of Thelypteris subfalciloba include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe and protect the skin, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or decoction, which can be consumed to take advantage of its health benefits, including reducing fever and improving respiratory health.
